## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Environment Details

- Operating System: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS, Linux, Android]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge]
- Access Method: [e.g. Password Login, AuthKey Direct Paste]

## Additional Context

Add any other context, browser console error logs, or screenshots about the problem here.
